title: Tangy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A sour and aerated one-pot Malaysian dish featuring garlic sauce and deglaze, this recipe is FODMAP-friendly and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the garlic sauce and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Use a spoon to deglaze the bottom of the pot, scraping up any browned bits.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
